---
title: "06 — ggplot2 i wizualizacja"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(ggplot2)
```

## ggplot2 anatomy

```{r}
# Każdy wykres: dane + aes() + geom_*()
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point()
```

```{r}
# Color and shape in aes() → zależy od danych (tworzy legendę)
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg, color = factor(cyl), shape = factor(am))) +
  geom_point(size = 3)
```

```{r}
# Color outside aes() → stały dla wszystkich punktów
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2)
```

## Geoms

```{r fig.height=3}
# Histogram
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = mpg)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 10, fill = "steelblue")
```

```{r fig.height=3}
# Boxplot
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = factor(cyl), y = mpg)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```

```{r fig.height=3}
# Boxplot base R (szybszy zapis)
boxplot(mpg ~ cyl, data = mtcars)
```

```{r fig.height=3}
# Line + points
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point()
```

```{r fig.height=3}
# Linear regression
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE)
```

## Facets

```{r fig.height=4}
# facet_wrap — jedna zmienna, panele "zawijane"
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~cyl)
```

```{r fig.height=4}
# facet_grid — siatka wg DWÓCH zmiennych
# wiersz ~ kolumna; . oznacza brak podziału w tym wymiarze
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_grid(am ~ cyl)
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
# scales="free" — każdy panel ma własną oś
facet_grid(var1 ~ var2, scales = "free")
facet_grid(. ~ var2) # columns only
facet_grid(var1 ~ .) # rows only
```

## Saving plots

```{r eval=FALSE}
# ggsave — zapisuje ostatni wykres
ggsave("wykres.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
ggsave("wykres.png", dpi = 300)

# Base R — otwórz urządzenie, narysuj, zamknij
pdf("wykres.pdf")
plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg)
dev.off()

# Copy active graphics window
dev.copy2pdf(file = "wykres.pdf")
```

## Base R graphics (szybkie szkice)

```{r fig.height=3}
plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg,
  pch = 16, col = "steelblue",
  xlab = "Masa (1000 lb)", ylab = "Mile/galon"
)
abline(lm(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars), col = "red")
```

```{r fig.height=3}
# Add points do istniejącego wykresu
plot(mtcars$wt, mtcars$mpg)
points(mtcars$wt[mtcars$cyl == 8], mtcars$mpg[mtcars$cyl == 8],
  col = "red", pch = 17
)
```
